strengths: Demonstrated successful bilateral instrument coordination during initial transfers
Maintained stable grasp control throughout observed transfer sequences
Showed consistent peg-to-pin placement accuracy during the outbound phase
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full task sequence, leaving 4 objects on the right side
Took excessive time (245 seconds) indicating inefficient movement patterns
Did not maintain task awareness to ensure all transfers were completed

drills.name: Complete Cycle Rehearsal
drills.description: Practice the full 6-object transfer sequence slowly, counting aloud each completed transfer to maintain task awareness.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the full task sequence.

drills.name: Economy-of-Motion Ladder
drills.description: Perform single object transfers with minimal regrasping, focusing on direct pickup-to-placement movements.
drills.targets_weakness: Took excessive time indicating inefficient movement patterns.

progression_note: At the novice level, prioritize completing the full task sequence consistently before focusing on speed improvements.
